title: Lulu Hypermarket India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Lulu Hypermarket India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Floor Manager with drive and ambition, Lulu Hypermarket India in Raipur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Lulu Hypermarket India:
Lulu Hypermarket India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lulu Hypermarket India!
